- Assisted prone hamstring: This exercise targets the hamstrings and can be modified to suit your fitness level. It's an excellent choice for those who want to strengthen their hamstrings without putting too much strain on their lower back.
- Dumbbell lying femoral: This exercise targets the hamstrings and glutes, making it an excellent choice for those who want to strengthen their lower body. It's also a great exercise for those who want to improve their balance and stability.
- Inverse leg curl (bench support): This exercise targets the hamstrings and can be modified to suit your fitness level. It's an excellent choice for those who want to strengthen their hamstrings without putting too much strain on their lower back.

These exercises are all great options for targeting your hamstrings. Remember to start with lighter weights and gradually increase the weight as you become stronger.
